5834 def _url_targets_local_or_meta(parsed_url, allow_loopback=True):
5835     """Return True if the URL resolves to a host class an SSRF attacker
5836     would exploit: link-local (covers AWS/GCP/Azure metadata services at
5837     169.254.169.254), unspecified (0.0.0.0), and — when allow_loopback
5838     is False — loopback (127.0.0.0/8, ::1).
5839 
5840     RFC1918 private networks are deliberately allowed since RemotePower
5841     targets the LAN by design.
5842 
5843     v3.3.0 C3: loopback used to be unconditionally blocked, which broke
5844     the legitimate ntfy / gotify / dev-instance use case. Now controlled
5845     by allow_loopback so the safer default (block cloud metadata) ships
5846     on by default while operators running a sidecar notifier on
5847     127.0.0.1 keep working.
5848 
5849     Resolves the hostname via socket.getaddrinfo; on resolve failure
5850     returns False (don't block what we can't classify — handler will
5851     fail later with a network error).
5852     """
5853     import socket
5854     host = parsed_url.hostname or ''
5855     if not host:
5856         return True   # No host at all — block to be safe
5857     try:
5858         addrs = socket.getaddrinfo(host, None)
5859     except socket.gaierror:
5860         return False  # Can't resolve — let the request through, will fail anyway
5861     for _family, _t, _p, _c, sockaddr in addrs:
5862         try:
5863             if _ip_class_blocked(sockaddr[0], allow_loopback):
5864                 return True
5865         except (ValueError, IndexError):
5866             continue
5867     return False

5870 def _ip_class_blocked(ip_str, allow_loopback=True):
5871     """Per-IP SSRF classifier shared by the pre-flight DNS check and the
5872     connect-time peer recheck. Returns True for the host classes an SSRF
5873     attacker would target: link-local (covers 169.254.169.254 cloud
5874     metadata), unspecified (0.0.0.0), multicast and reserved, and — when
5875     allow_loopback is False — loopback. RFC1918 private ranges are allowed
5876     by design (LAN fleet)."""
5877     import ipaddress
5878     ip = ipaddress.ip_address(ip_str)
5879     # Unwrap IPv6 forms that embed an IPv4 address and re-classify the inner
5880     # v4 — otherwise a v4 metadata/loopback target can be smuggled past the
5881     # v6 checks: v4-mapped (::ffff:a.b.c.d), 6to4 (2002::/16), and the NAT64
5882     # well-known prefix (64:ff9b::/96 wrapping 169.254.169.254).
5883     if isinstance(ip, ipaddress.IPv6Address):
5884         inner = ip.ipv4_mapped or ip.sixtofour
5885         if inner is None and (int(ip) >> 32) == (0x0064ff9b << 64):
5886             inner = ipaddress.IPv4Address(int(ip) & 0xffffffff)
5887         if inner is not None:
5888             ip = inner
5889     # Decide loopback first: ::1 is also is_reserved, so the reserved check
5890     # below would otherwise block a loopback target even when allowed.
5891     if ip.is_loopback:
5892         return not allow_loopback
5893     if (ip.is_link_local or ip.is_unspecified
5894             or ip.is_multicast or ip.is_reserved):
5895         return True
5896     return False
